critical_regression_check.detail: Step 2 (create_itinerary_items immediately after trip creation in the same session) succeeded with no errors. The no_trip_selected bug from Run 19 did NOT reproduce. The AI called select_trip defensively before create_itinerary_items, which may mask the underlying fix but confirms the user-facing behavior is correct.

bugs.title: Chat history drops one user+assistant message pair in multi-turn session
bugs.description: In a 6-message session (steps 1-6), the Step 2 user message ('Start with 3 days in Santorini...') and its full assistant response were not persisted to chat history. GetChatHistory returns 10 messages (5 user + 5 assistant) instead of the expected 12. ListChatSessions messageCount also shows 10, confirming the messages were never saved to Firestore. The tools (create_itinerary_items, suggest_expert) executed successfully and the stream completed normally, but the persistence layer dropped this message pair. This is a recurrence of the Run 21a P2 bug.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Create a trip via SendMessage in selection mode. 2. Immediately send a follow-up in planning mode requesting itinerary items (Step 2). 3. Continue sending 4 more messages (Steps 3-6). 4. Call GetChatHistory -- observe Step 2's message pair is missing.
bugs.actual: 10 messages in session 1 (5 user + 5 assistant). Step 2 pair dropped.

bugs.title: Text stutter in AI response (garbled repetition)
bugs.description: Step 2 response ends with 'to keep you close to these spots? I close to these views?' -- garbled repetition of the ending phrase. Step 7 response contains 'Islan life! Isand life on Day 5!' -- garbled repetition of 'Island life'. This is a recurrence of the text stutter bug from Run 19 N-01 P2.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Send multi-turn messages in planning mode. 2. Read the fullContent of messageComplete events. 3. Observe garbled/duplicated phrases at the end of some responses.
bugs.expected: No duplicated or garbled phrases in AI responses
bugs.actual: Two instances of text stutter detected: (1) 'I close to these views?' in Step 2, (2) 'Islan life! Isand life on Day 5!' in Step 7

bugs.title: AI over-generates itinerary items beyond user request
bugs.description: In multiple steps, the AI created far more items than requested. Step 3: user asked for 2 items (beach day + dinner), AI created 10 items including unsolicited days 6-7 in Athens. Step 5: user asked to remove 1 item, AI also added 6 new items for days 1-3. Step 7: user asked for 1 day trip, AI created 3 items (transport + sightseeing + lunch). While the extra items are high quality, this behavior deviates from user intent and makes the itinerary harder to manage.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. In planning mode, ask to add 2 specific items. 2. Observe AI creates 10+ items including unsolicited additions.
bugs.expected: AI creates only the items explicitly requested by the user
bugs.actual: AI proactively fills entire days and adds items the user did not ask for

bugs.title: AI uses delete+create instead of reorder_itinerary_items tool
bugs.description: When asked to 'move the wine tasting to day 4 in Mykonos', the AI used delete_itinerary_items + create_itinerary_items instead of the reorder_itinerary_items tool. The result was semantically correct (the wine tasting was moved to day 4 and its content was adapted from Santorini to Mykonos context), but the reorder tool from PR #247 was not exercised.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Have an itinerary with items. 2. Ask AI to 'move' an item to a different day. 3. Observe AI uses delete+create rather than reorder.

bugs.title: Redundant tool calls (create_itinerary_items called 3x for same items)
bugs.description: In Step 7 (new session), the AI called create_itinerary_items 3 times with the same 3 items. The first call succeeded (created_count: 3). The second and third calls returned 'already_exists' with created_count: 0. The duplicate-prevention logic works correctly, but the AI should not be calling the tool repeatedly with identical input.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Send a message requesting items. 2. Observe AI calls create_itinerary_items multiple times with the same items in the same response.
bugs.expected: AI calls create_itinerary_items once per set of items
bugs.actual: AI called it 3 times with identical items (1 success + 2 already_exists)

bugs.title: suggest_expert first call fails with no_destination error
bugs.description: In Step 2, the AI called suggest_expert with only {themes: ['wine','food']} and no region_code, receiving a 'no_destination' error. It then retried with {region_code: 'GR', themes: ['wine','food']} which succeeded. The AI should include the region_code on the first attempt since it knows the destination from the trip context.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Create a trip with destination GR. 2. Ask about wine tasting. 3. Observe AI calls suggest_expert without region_code first, then retries.
bugs.expected: suggest_expert called with region_code on first attempt
bugs.actual: First call fails with no_destination, second call succeeds with region_code

ux_issues.description: Day 5 in the final itinerary is overcrowded with 5 items (Delos day trip + original beach/dinner items) that logistically conflict. The Delos boat trip and Paradise Beach day are both half-day activities that can't easily coexist on the same day.
ux_issues.suggestion: AI should recognize temporal conflicts when adding items to a day that's already full and suggest spreading across days or replacing existing items.

ux_issues.description: Day 1 has two items with the same orderInDay value (both orderInDay: 1), suggesting the ordering logic does not properly increment when appending to an existing day.
ux_issues.suggestion: When adding items to a day that already has items, auto-increment orderInDay to avoid duplicates.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI responded in the voice of the newly switched persona mid-stream
ai_behavior_issues.context: In Step 2, the AI started responding as Toqui, then mid-response switched to 'Dimitris' persona via suggest_expert. The response contains content from both personas concatenated. In Step 3, the same pattern occurred with a nightlife/food expert handoff.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: Response verbosity after tool loops -- same content repeated in different words
ai_behavior_issues.context: In Step 7, the AI response contains 3 near-identical blocks describing the Delos day trip (once before the second tool call, once after, and once more after the third). Total response is ~1500 words for a simple 'add a day trip' request.

previous_bugs_status.P0_telemetry_flusher: FIXED -- streaming RPCs work correctly. No statusWriter Flusher errors observed.
previous_bugs_status.P1_testctl_jwt_claims: FIXED -- token includes iss='toqui' and aud='toqui-api' claims. Token accepted by all RPCs.
previous_bugs_status.P2_chat_history_drop: STILL_PRESENT -- one user+assistant pair dropped in 6-message session (Step 2 pair missing).
previous_bugs_status.P2_text_stutter: STILL_PRESENT -- two instances of garbled/duplicated text detected in Steps 2 and 7.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The CRITICAL regression (no_trip_selected on follow-up messages after trip creation) did NOT reproduce -- trip context persistence across messages works correctly. This is the primary finding: the Run 19 fix holds. All key tools fired successfully: create_trip, create_itinerary_items (across 6 consecutive messages and a cross-session test), delete_itinerary_items, update_trip, and suggest_expert. The two P0/P1 infrastructure bugs from the previous run (telemetry Flusher, testctl JWT claims) are both FIXED. Two P2 bugs persist from the previous run: chat history message dropping (Step 2 pair lost) and text stutter (2 instances). New findings: AI over-generates items, uses delete+create instead of reorder tool, makes redundant tool calls, and produces very verbose multi-persona responses. The itinerary content quality remains excellent with practical, detailed descriptions.

day_5: Explore the Sacred Island of Delos (sightseeing)

deleted_items: Santorini Wine Tasting Experience (step 4, moved to Mykonos)
moved_items: Wine Tasting: moved from day 3 Santorini to day 4 Mykonos (via delete+create)
